sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n10865" key="a)nuphre/tatos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀνυπηρέ-τᾱτος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n10865.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">without attendance,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Euryph.</author> </bibl> ap. <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Stob.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">4.39.27</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
